Container.Name: heldash
Container.Overview: HELDASH — A personal homelab dashboard with a clean glass morphism design. Features: Service monitoring, Docker management, Home Assistant integration, Recyclarr/CF Manager, activity logging and more. Bug reports and feature requests welcome via GitHub Issues.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the HELDASH web interface

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for container management and monitoring

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Required: random secret for session encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: SECURE_COOKIES
Config.Description: Set to false for local HTTP access. Set to true when using HTTPS via reverse proxy.

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error

Config.Name: RECYCLARR_CONFIG_PATH
Config.Description: Path to recyclarr.yml inside the Recyclarr container (optional)

Config.Name: RECYCLARR_CONTAINER_NAME
Config.Description: Name of your Recyclarr Docker container (optional)

Config.Name: Recyclarr Config Dir
Config.Description: Path to your Recyclarr appdata directory (optional, required for Recyclarr integration)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (Unraid default: 99)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (Unraid default: 100)

Config.Name: Boot (CA Backup)
Config.Description: Optional: Nur für CA Backup Log-Überwachung erforderlich. Pfad: /boot
